per_case.stage_c_reasoning: The claim states "Obama holds_role President," and Q76 (Barack Obama) is the only candidate who actually served as President of the United States (2009-2017). The other candidates were not presidents: Barack Obama Sr. was an economist, and Barack Obama Mandela was a political candidate but not a president.

The source text states "Obama was President" which clearly refers to Barack Obama, who served as president of the United States from 2009 to 2017. Q76 (Barack Obama) is the only candidate who held the office of President. The other candidates are either his father or a different person with Obama in their name who was a Republican candidate, neither of whom were President.

The source text states "Obama was President from 2009 to 2017," which directly matches Q76 (Barack Obama) whose description explicitly states he was "president of the United States from 2009 to 2017." The other candidates are either his father (Q649593) or an unrelated individual (Q139377510).

The claim states "Einstein received_award Nobel Prize," which refers to a person receiving an award. Q937 is Albert Einstein, the famous german-born theoretical physicist (1879–1955), who is historically known to have received the Nobel Prize in Physics. All other candidates refer to institutions, artworks, or objects named after Einstein, not the person himself who could receive awards.

The source text explicitly states "Amazon is the world's largest river by discharge." Q3783 is the Wikidata entity for Amazon the river in South America, which directly matches this description. This is clearly referring to the geographic river, not the technology company or any other Amazon-related entity.
